programme.desc: Sehari sebelum hari perkahwinannya dengan Aji, Nila mengalami kemalangan dan hilang penglihatan. Aji membatalkan perkahwinan itu. Galang yang tidak sanggup melihat Nila, terdesak untuk melamar Nila.

programme.title: Harta Dalam Stor
programme.desc: Ikuti hos Nabil Mahir dan Azhar Sulaiman menerjah stor kediaman selebriti tanahair untuk mencari barang-barang yang boleh digunapakai dan dijual.

programme.title: Kak Kek & Abe Mmasok
programme.desc: Siapa yang rindu dengan celoteh Kak Kek boleh tengok Kak Kek dalam rancangan terbarunya, Kak Kek & Abe Mmasok!

programme.title: 3 Gadis Manis
programme.desc: 3 Gadis Manis sebuah drama mini bersiri digital eksklusif dari Gempak yang mengangkat tema persahabatan.

programme.title: No Filter
programme.desc: Saksikan Kamal Adli sebagai hos membawa selebriti bercuti bersama peminatnya dalam Curi-Curi Cuti di bawah kempen #expeRIAnce.

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna
programme.desc: Amanda bersetuju dengan Marian untuk tidak melantik Diana sebagai tukang masak di majlis perkahwinannya nanti. Luqman tahu hubungannya dengan Qistina akan mendapat tentangan keluarga.

programme.title: First Wives
programme.desc: Diyana dan Michelle terpaksa menghadapi realiti keretakan perkahwinan mereka.

programme.title: Di Balik Idola
programme.desc: Program bual bicara menggunakan konsep terbuka membariskan penyanyi dan pelakon. Berkongsi pengalaman dan cerita yang belum pernah diketahui oleh masyarakat.

programme.title: Chef Terjun
programme.desc: Hos Akhmal Nazri memberanikan diri untuk keluar dari zon selesanya dan menyahut cabaran untuk menjadi tukang masak untuk satu hari di tempat-tempat makan yang terkenal di Malaysia.

programme.title: Check In : Cinta
programme.desc: Check in Cinta menyingkap kehidupan romantis dan manja para selebriti di sebalik dunia glamor. Mereka berkongsi pengalaman berkenalan sebelum bergelar pasangan suami isteri yang mungkin ramai tidak tahu.

programme.title: Lelaki Macam Dia
programme.desc: Fahmi dan Husna merupakan jiran yang tinggal bersebelahan rumah. Fahmi seorang yang lurus dan tidak mempunyai perwatakan yang menarik akhirnya mampu berubah menjadi seorang "superstar" dan memikat hati Hus

programme.title: The Lucky Bini Show
programme.desc: Pelbagai permainan yang menyeronokkan & menarik yang dibuat untuk pasangan selebriti yang sudah berkahwin, tindakan dan jawapan mereka yang tidak dapat diramalkan melalui kuiz dan permainan fizikal.

programme.title: Beriyani Gam Kak Aspalela
programme.desc: Sebuah program menarik untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Rasa Nostalgia Ramadan 3
programme.desc: Menyajikan hidangan istimewa dari nenek moyang mereka dan membincangkan makanan nostalgia ketika menjelang Ramadan

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna
programme.desc: Mariana masih merindui kenangan lama bersama Luqman dan terus membuat perancangan supaya dia dapat bersama dengan Liuqman. Luqman cemburu dengan keakraban Qistina dan ibunya.

programme.title: expeRIAnce:Fantasy Escape
programme.desc: Sebuah program yang merealisasikan impian peminat bertuah untuk melakukan aktiviti yang mereka gemari bersama selebriti pilihan mereka yang turut berkongsi pengalaman dan memberi motivasi.

programme.title: Ready, Set, Action!
programme.desc: Meneroka tempat ikonik yang pernah menjadi lokasi latar belakang adegan filem terkenal.

programme.title: Lelaki Macam Dia

programme.title: First Wives
programme.desc: Semuanya mencapai kemuncak di lelongan amal Azzimart. Diyana dan Michelle mempunyai satu peluang terakhir untuk menjatuhkan Amber, Toa Seng, dan Azzim untuk selama-lamanya.

programme.title: Anais Patah Hati Pertama Kali
programme.desc: Anais, seorang chef membuat pastri berusia 30-an, putus cinta untuk pertama kalinya dalam hidup, dan menghadapi masalah untuk mengawal emosinya.

programme.title: Malaysian Ghost Stories S2
programme.desc: Perihal adik-beradik yang mempunyai deria keenam dan cuba menyelesaikan kes-kes berkaitan dengan sihir yang mengganggu orang di sekeliling mereka.

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna

programme.title: Kami Geng Bola
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan debat secara santai, komedi dan berat sebelah mengenai semua perlawanan tumpuan di liga domestic dan antarbangsa. Rancangan ini akan dihoskan oleh Dato' Afdlin Shauki.

programme.title: Tersuka Tanpa Sengaja
programme.desc: Perkahwinan Syed Arif dan Farhah tanpa bersulam cinta mengundang pelbagai konflik. Ketika hubungan mula serasi, Syed Arif bertemu semula dengan kekasih lamanya, Katrina yang rupanya adik kepada Farhah.

programme.title: Pengantin Lelaki Untuk Cik Gadis
programme.desc: Pertemuan Kris dan Salsa bermula ketika Kris membawa diri pulang ke kampung Tok Abah. Salsa kini menghadapi tuduhan pecah amanah.

programme.title: Ratu Ten Pin

programme.title: Siapa Jaga Mak?
programme.desc: Diilhamkan oleh kisah-kisah pengasuh yang benar, Siapa Jaga Mak ceritakan tentang empat keluarga yang menghadapi pelbagai emosi daripada penjagaan orang tua.

programme.title: Asmara Beijing
programme.desc: Dira bercuti ke Beijing bersama kawannya, Shima untuk menenangkan fikiran selepas putus cinta dengan Rizal. Ketika di Beijing, Salina bertemu bekas kekasihnya, Imran.

programme.title: Scammer Geng Marhaban
programme.desc: Fifah tidak setuju dengan rancangan Maya untuk menipu Mami Sherry. Adib dan Aidil hormati keputusan Fifah tetapi mereka tetap mahu teruskan rancangan itu demi bersihkan kembali nama Hjh Quyah.

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna
programme.desc: Diana masih tidak berpuas hati dengan keputusan ibunya yang telah mengikut telunjuk Amanda. Ada bukti baru daripada Luqman yang bakal muncul yang mungkin akan membahayakan Aniq.

programme.title: Dalang Prank
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan hiburan prank yang melibatkan artis dan peserta yang menjadi dalang kepada prank masing-masing. Prank yang disukai oleh penonton akan dinobatkan Juara Dalang Prank.

programme.title: Mat Dan Kaki Jalan
programme.desc: Sebuah kisah travelog santai tentang perjalanan dan percutian seorang lelaki Inggeris Daniel Tayler atau dikenali sebagai Mat Dan berasal dari Cheltenham England ke Malaysia.

programme.title: My Buskers
programme.desc: Rancangan yang mempersembahkan selebriti-selebriti tempatan menyanyi bersama-sama dengan buskers-buskers tempatan menyanyikan lagu-lagu popular.

programme.title: Aunty Reporting For Duty
programme.desc: Saksikan geng mak-mak melakukan cabaran yang menguji fizikal dan minda mereka. Mampukah geng mak-mak menyelesaikan misi yang diberi?

programme.title: Pulau
programme.desc: Sekumpulan kawan yang sedang bercuti mengalami mimpi ngeri tatkala kalah pertaruhan dan mereka terpaksa bermalam di pulau terasing. Di situ, mereka bertembung dengan roh-roh ganas yang terperangkap.

programme.title: Dee The Series
programme.desc: Dee bersama adik dan ibunya Amy, memulakan hidup baru di KL apabila Amy mendapat kerja baru di sebuah kolej swasta. Bermulalah satu dunia baru untuk Dee yang penuh dengan muzik, gelak ketawa dan air mata.

programme.title: Karok La Kau!
programme.desc: Menampilkan seramai 78 orang selebriti berentap antara satu sama lain di pentas karaoke yang luar biasa.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When stray snails begin appearing around Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob decides to care for them himself; Patrick enters a Krabby Patty eating competition in order to defend Bikini Bottom's honor.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: The Krusty Krab crew goes to a big concert to sell krabby patties in the stands; SpongeBob explores the melodious dreamscapes of his sleeping neighbors.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs tries to sell a moldy krabby patty; Spongebob breaks his butt while sand sledding.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When a gang of kids steal the Krusty Krab's grill, SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs go to extreme lengths to win it back; SpongeBob helps out the Krusty Krab's night shift crew, but the customers crave something creepier than usual.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs fires SpongeBob to save money; SpongeBob tries to get back to work.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward and Plankton come together to make their very own stage play where SpongeBob is cast as the villain; Sandy decides to give herself gills so she can truly experience Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: While in prison, Plankton teams up with his fellow inmates to break out of jail and steal the secret Krabby Patty formula; SpongeBob replaces his broken spatula with one from Plankton.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton closes the Chum Bucket and moves to a new town, but Mr. Krabs suspects he is still up to no good; when SpongeBob accidentally picks up Neptune's magic trident, there is no telling what trouble he may cause.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton disguises himself as SpongeBob's grandmother; Mr. Krabs uses Gary to find spare change.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Madame Hagfish puts a hex on the Krusty Krab; SpongeBob and Patrick search for a legendary drain on the ocean floor.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When the circus comes to town and steals his customers away, Mr. Krabs tries to sabotage the show; Sandy spends the day solving everyone's issues, only to return home to her own monster of a problem.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton joins the League of E.V.I.L.; SpongeBob and Patrick take Squidward on a plane to a tropical resort.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs takes Pearl and SpongeBob on a vacation to the Ocean Mint.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to remove a splinter before Mr. Krabs learns about it and sends him home early; SpongeBob and Patrick get new slide whistles and keep playing them, much to the annoyance of Squidward.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and his friends prepare for King Neptune's birthday party at the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Miss Priss has Krabby Patties banned from Bikini Bottom; SpongeBob's clumsy cousin visits.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward gets caught speeding and is sent to boating school; Mr. Krabs launches a tabloid newspaper.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick must learn to share a toy; SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs go to the Cheapest Crab Convention.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward swallows his clarinet reed; Patrick disguises himself as a girl.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: After his house gets infested, Squidward checks into a hotel where a different kind of pest awaits him; SpongeBob and Patrick get duped into babysitting a grouchy old lady who keeps trying to escape.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob, Patrick and Squidward are locked in a time capsule; SpongeBob and Patrick build a dream world for Squidward.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob quits his job to live off the land; Squidward decides to sell his house.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Bubble Bass avoids paying his bill at the Krusty Krab, so SpongeBob and Squidward are sent to collect the cash; Mr. Krabs makes SpongeBob and Squidward cook a fancy meal for Mrs. Puff, but every dish becomes a dispute.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Everyone in Bikini Bottom competes in a worm-sled race to the South Pole.

programme.title: Rock Paper Scissors
programme.desc: When Pencil comes over to watch a horror movie, Paper worries he is too scared to handle it; there's a light wind, and Paper is far from home, so Rock and Scissors must try to save him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward cleans up Bikini Bottom with SpongeBob's help; SpongeBob gets Gary a pet.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get caught in the feud between a crew of ghost pirates and the Flying Dutchman.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob plays April Fools' Day pranks; SpongeBob disrupts the Fry Cook Hall of Fame.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs interferes with Pearl's slumber party preparations; SpongeBob decides to give Gary a makeover before entering him in a pet show.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick exchange tiny living versions of themselves; Plankton tells his grandma that he owns the Krusty Krab, but must keep the lie going when she comes to visit.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob wants to learn about Vikings; SpongeBob leaves boating school to go to a book signing.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton invents a machine enabling him to switch lives with Mr. Krabs; SpongeBob volunteers for lifeguard duty.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick dress up as Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy to attend a shuffleboard tournament in their place; Squidward is mistaken for his rival Squilliam and is invited to teach a class at a prestigious music school.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward is stuck indoors with SpongeBob and Patrick during a storm; Plankton creates an underground restaurant that threatens to put the Krusty Krab out of business.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Patrick joins SpongeBob at boating school, but it's not smooth sailing; Mr. Krabs celebrates a business milestone.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob realizes he wants to fly with the jellyfish; Patchy uncovers a brand-new episode of SpongeBob and then loses it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob discovers that Squidward has never actually tried a Krabby patty; a bully threatens SpongeBob.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs decides to start selling hot dogs; SpongeBob and Patrick discover a lost ship.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When Mr. Krabs gets in trouble for littering, he makes SpongeBob and Squidward clean up Bikini Bottom; a sea bunny ravages Squidward's garden, but SpongeBob thinks it's cute.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward is so tired that SpongeBob and Patrick are unable to wake him up, but they do not want him to miss his big audition; Mr. Krabs and his crew cater a fancy party, but they might be out of their depth with their new wealthy customers.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When a storm sweeps the Krusty Krab away, the crew and customers must rely on a crazed Krabs to lead them back home; Patrick's last baby tooth needs to come out, but he fears letting it go.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Sandy's homemade snack becomes a big hit at the Krusty Krab; SpongeBob and Patrick's favorite comedy duo has a falling out on live television.

programme.title: Rock Paper Scissors
programme.desc: Paper and Pencil tell a kind of funny joke at a party and chase the feeling of people finding them funny by telling it again and again; Scissors hires an orchestra to follow him around and score his life.

programme.title: Rock Paper Scissors
programme.desc: When Rock's dad comes to town, Rock joins the family business in an attempt to finally impress his father; after receiving a glitter bomb in the mail, Rock vows revenge on the anonymous bomber.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lucy casts a spell; Rusty and the rest of their friends try to toughen Zach up.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Luan turns to Mr. Coconuts for help after she struggles to direct her school's play; Lisa joins Lynn's football team as the analytics coach to prove that math will always beat out heart.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Tired of Mom's sticky note system, Lincoln and Lisa create an app to keep track of the family's schedule; Lana creates an auto body shop to try and buy a new bike, but her shop turns corrupt when Flip becomes her mentor.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When a fancy grocery store opens on the block, Bobby rallies the family to do everything they can to compete; Ronnie Anne fakes being sick to watch a Lucha Libre match, which proves to be more difficult than anticipated.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lana springs into action when she learns her favorite fish are in jeopardy of losing their home to construction; when Leni gets fired from her job due to missing scarves, Lincoln and Clyde, as Ace and Jack, take on the case.

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.desc: Harry Wilson is having the season of his career, and is one of the league leaders in direct goal involvements. This week, the Wales international sits down with the Big Interview to discuss his prolific form and his journey to the Premier League.

programme.desc: Wolves have won their last two Premier League games, having only won one of their previous 32 (D8 L23).

programme.title: Cosmoball
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a galactic war that shattered the moon and shifted Earth's poles, a massive spaceship named 'Cosmoball' hovers ominously above the planet.

programme.title: The Simpsons Movie
programme.desc: An environmental disaster strikes when Homer's reckless actions contaminate Springfield's water source. The town is sealed under a massive dome by the EPA, branding the Simpsons as outlaws on the run.

programme.title: Die Hard
programme.desc: John McClane, a police officer from New York City, tries to save a group of people who have been held hostage by terrorists during a Christmas Eve party.

programme.title: Die Hard 2
programme.desc: When a team of terrorists threaten to destroy an airport and demand the release of the drug lord Ramon Esperanza, detective John McClane tries to stop them.

programme.title: Die Hard 3
programme.desc: Detective John McClane plays a twisted game with a terrorist known only as Simon, who threatens to detonate bombs across New York City if John does not comply with his demands.

programme.title: Die Hard 4.0
programme.desc: The FBI gives John McClane an assignment to track down a cyber criminal. So, John joins forces with a young ethical hacker to catch the culprit.

programme.title: A Good Day to Die Hard
programme.desc: New York City cop John McClane and his estranged son must put aside their differences and work together to get a Russian whistleblower to safety and thwart a disastrous crime in Chernobyl.

programme.title: Dawn of the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Caesar, a chimpanzee and leader of the evolved apes, allows a human family into his territory. However, due to a vindictive bonobo, misunderstandings arise between the two species, resulting in war.

programme.title: Avengers: Endgame
programme.desc: Thanos, an intergalactic warlord, erases half of all life in the universe. As a result, the Avengers must reunite to reverse his actions only to find out that he destroyed the Infinity Stones.

programme.title: Salt
programme.desc: CIA agent Evelyn Salt's life takes an ugly turn when she is accused of planning the assassination of the Russian president. However, she flees and sets out to prove her innocence.

programme.title: The Cable Guy
programme.desc: Chip, a cable technician, sets his sights on befriending Steven, a new customer whom he takes a fancy to. But when Steven spurns their friendship, Chip immediately starts to wreak havoc in his life.

programme.title: Baby Driver
programme.desc: When talented getaway driver Baby meets his dream girl, Debora, he chooses to leave his shady life behind. But when he is called in for one last heist with an unstable crew, things get dicey.

programme.title: The Karate Kid
programme.desc: Dre, a young boy, finds himself bullied by Cheng, a rebellious kung fu prodigy at his school. However, things change after he befriends Mr Han, a maintenance man, who happens to be a kung fu expert.

programme.title: Anaconda
programme.desc: A documentary crew, who are on a mission to find a tribe named Shirishamas, help a snake hunter when they find him stranded. However, he forces them to risk their lives and hunt down an anaconda.

programme.title: The Man From Toronto
programme.desc: A struggling entrepreneur plans a surprise for his wife's birthday, but due to a twist of fate, he gets caught in the middle of an operation to apprehend an assassin.

programme.title: Armored
programme.desc: Ty Hackett takes up a job in the same company where his father worked before he died. His mentor Mike convinces him to be a part of the robbery of two armoured trucks, but their plan goes haywire.

programme.title: Valspar Championship Round 1
programme.desc: The Valspar Championship, the most colorful PGA Tour tournament in the world takes place at the Innisbrook Golf and Spa Resort in Florida. The tournament was founded in 2000. Golfers will compete for the prize fund of US$8.4 million. Vijay Singh set the tournament record in 2004 with 266 (−18) and won by five strokes.

programme.title: Fortinet Founders Cup Round 1
programme.desc: The Founders Cup is a premier LPGA event celebrating the 13 founding members of the LPGA, who created the Association in 1950. The world's best golfers will gather at the Bradenton Country Club to contest the prize purse of $2 million.

Constantine
programme.desc: Detective Angela approaches Constantine, an exorcist, to help her investigate her twin sister's death. As he digs deeper, he realises a dark conspiracy which could threaten the world.

programme.title: The Lost City
programme.desc: This is Film - Action Category.

programme.title: Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: After losing his job, lover and his powers, Peter Parker feels dissatisfied with his life. Soon, amidst all this chaos, he also has to fight Doctor Octavius who poses a threat to the New York.

programme.title: Godzilla: King of the Monsters
programme.desc: A legendary monster named King Ghidorah awakens Rodan, as well as other titans, to destroy the world. To defeat them, the crypto-zoological organisation Monarch must rely on the almighty Godzilla.

programme.title: Dora and the Lost City of Gold
programme.desc: While searching for a hidden land, the parents of a teenage Dora go missing. Consequently, she and her new high-school friends go in search of the lost city of gold with hopes of finding her parents.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood
programme.desc: A Vietnam War veteran arrives in a small town but faces hostility from the local sheriff, leading to a tense conflict where survival instincts and combat skills take over.

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction
programme.desc: Cade Yeager, a struggling single father discovers a damaged truck which turns out to be Optimus Prime. Together with the remaining Autobots, he and his family must rise to face an impending threat.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible II
programme.desc: Agent Ethan Hunt fights against a rogue terrorist and rushes to prevent a deadly virus from spreading. To avert a global catastrophe, Ethan has to bring everything to an end.

programme.title: A Dog's Way Home
programme.desc: When Lucas sends his beloved dog, Bella, far away to safety, she begins an arduous journey across Colorado to be reunited with him.

programme.title: Monte Carlo
programme.desc: Grace, who is vacationing in Paris with her friends and stepsister, is mistaken for a British heiress. Later, the three women are whisked away to Monte Carlo, where they discover royalty and romance.

programme.title: Safe Haven
programme.desc: A mysterious young woman arrives in Southport, North Carolina, and falls in love with a widowed store owner. However, her dark past intrudes in her new life.

programme.title: Carpool
programme.desc: Daniel Miller has to take care of the carpool for his sons and the neighbourhood school children when his wife falls sick. However, in the course of the day, he finds himself a victim of a robbery.

programme.title: My Best Friend's Wedding
programme.desc: When an old confidante of a woman reveals about his engagement, she sets off on a journey to sabotage his wedding after realising her love for him.

programme.title: Miss You Already
programme.desc: Milly and Jess find their lifelong friendship and lives turned upside down when Milly gets diagnosed with breast cancer while Jess is trying to start a family.

programme.title: The Smurfs 2
programme.desc: When Gargamel learns that Smurfette knows a secret spell that can turn Naughties, Smurf-like creatures, into real Smurfs, he kidnaps her. The Smurfs set out to rescue Smurfette.

programme.title: Eat Pray Love
programme.desc: Elizabeth Gilbert's perfect world comes shattering down when she gets divorced. She then embarks on a journey across the world in an attempt to rediscover her true self.

programme.title: The Gold Rush
programme.desc: During the Klondike Gold Rush, a lone prospector goes through a series of misfortunes, including a blizzard and starvation. However, he finds love even in the stormy Alaska.

programme.desc: Buffalo Joe has been a captain on the daily sked for 34 years and his 70th birthday is next week. Working together often causes Dafa and Kirana to fall in love. Knowing this, Maura wants to steal Dafa away.

programme.title: Emangnya Boleh Vibes Cintanya Sepura Pura Ini?
programme.desc: Retta had an accident and fell into the swimming pool and drowned. Rio, who saw this, immediately rescued Retta. Rio managed to save Retta's life. Retta's mother, upon hearing this, quickly arranged for Rio and Retta to be matched and for both of them to marry soon. What happens next?

programme.title: Antara Aku, Kamu, Dan Lutung Kasarung
programme.desc: Mr. Reksa was a plantation entrepreneur who left his wealth to his kind-hearted daughter, Lily, through a will. Lily's arrogant and envious siblings attempted to seize the inheritance in various ways, including hiring thugs and even trying to kill Lily. However, Lily succeeded in building a good relationship with the lutung kasarung and a young man named Keenan, who had previously helped her, brin

programme.title: Love Story The Series S3
programme.desc: Kendra's meeting with Maudy began with an accidental meeting at the Villa, that's where Ken first saw Maudy and immediately fell in love. Initially, Maudy was disturbed by Ken's presence, accidentally the horse that Maudy was riding went berserk until it fell into the river, not long after Ken jumped to save Maudy.

programme.title: Neng Rujak Emang Boleh Ya Segalak Itu
programme.desc: A beautiful girl named Arina sells fruit salad. Arina joins a matchmaking app and meets a handsome man with long hair. Because she's afraid to meet in real life, she asks her friend Ria to take her place. At first, Ria refuses, but eventually agrees to meet the man on the app due to Arina's insistence. However, a strange incident occurs when Arina is caught pretending to be someone else while talk

programme.title: Cinta Setelah Cinta S1
programme.desc: Love After Love tells the story of a family that appears perfect but hides a heartbreaking secret. Feeling lucky to have a husband like Niko, a successful businessman, and a daughter, Audrey, Starla must now swallow the bitterness of Niko's affair with their mutual school friend, Ayu.

programme.title: Agak Lain Cewek Samson Yang Satu Ini
programme.desc: Erina is indeed somewhat different from ordinary girls. She has nicknamed the Samson girl because she possesses super strength like Samson. However, her strength suddenly disappears because she has feelings for someone named Leo. So, how can Erina restore her strength? Could it be that she has to let go of her love for Leo?

Billionaire Story
programme.desc: A street separates two worlds. On one side, there is a hard-working life in the market with both hardships and laughter; one the other, it's the life of rich and wealthy families who are intriguing and trembling.

programme.title: The Inn 4
programme.desc: Escape to a seaside inn where life slows down and joy takes over. Watch friends run a charming getaway, uncover surprises, and share heartfelt moments in a journey about companionship, healing, and the beauty of living well.

programme.title: Destined
programme.desc: Lin Yu Ru, the daughter of a cloth merchant who's suffered childhood hardships and she is married to Gu Jiu Si who is the notorious son of Yangzhou's wealthiest family, infamous for his indolent ways. They grow closer despite their differences.

programme.title: AI Romantic
programme.desc: Ah Bao (Ali Lee), a high-end AI, accidentally got lost when leaving the factory and happened to land into Gu family. Ah Bao assisted Gu family with various strange tasks. At the same time, she detects a computer virus that may terminate her life.

programme.title: Perfect Match 12
programme.desc: Perfect Match is a highly-rated large-scale dating variety show that connects eligible bachelors to bachelorettes in China. Be thoroughly entertained by the sharp and witty Meng Fei, one of the top hosts for shows of this genre, as he presents a unique and humorous approach to interactions between all the participants.
